text.title: Competitive Intelligence Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Competitive Intelligence. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.fix: Run fact-checker on every digest/battlecard; HEAD every URL, reject 4xx.

antipattern.symptom: JS-rendered SPA returns shell page; collector logs 'no change'.
antipattern.root-cause: Author used raw curl without JS rendering.
antipattern.fix: Use Firecrawl / Jina / Playwright; alert on body-length variance > 80%.

antipattern.symptom: Digest re-summarises last week's digest, losing the 'so what'.
antipattern.root-cause: Synthesizer fed digests instead of raw events.
antipattern.fix: Re-ground synthesizer on raw NDJSON events, not previous digests.

antipattern.symptom: Prompt 'Is X a threat?' returns yes 100% of the time.
antipattern.root-cause: Closed yes/no prompt with no evidence floor.
antipattern.fix: Default threat score 1; require evidence accumulation to raise it.
